requirement.title: Mixed Grader Type
requirement.description: When grader is "mixed", split assertions into behavioral and text groups, grade each with the appropriate grader, and combine into a unified score.

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Assertions with [tool_*] prefix go to code grader (behavioral). Assertions with [ ] prefix go to model grader (text). REQ-F008
Model assertions score 0 or 1 (binary): model score >= 0.8 maps to 1, model score < 0.8 maps to 0. REQ-F008
Combined trial score = pass_count / total_assertion_count. Trial passes if combined score >= 0.8. REQ-F008
If scenario has 0 behavioral assertions, mixed grader falls back to pure model grading (existing behavior). REQ-F008
If scenario has 0 text assertions, mixed grader falls back to pure code grading (behavioral only). REQ-F008
Per-assertion scores are preserved in result for dashboard display (both behavioral and model scores individually). REQ-F008, REQ-F015
